prompt:
9:16 vertical orientation, high-precision 3D CG oriental fantasy female character portrait, anime-style 3D CG character art, semi-realistic 3D character render. The shot is a thigh and upper body composition. The subject is an adult young oriental fantasy woman, visual age about 20–26 years old. The overall vibe is cool, ethereal, exquisite, and quiet, with a mysterious and high-end feel like a water spirit in the rain. This is not a flat illustration, but a highly finished 3D CG character render with exquisite modeling, realistic materials, and cinematic cool soft lighting.

She has an exquisite oriental beauty face, smooth oval shape, cold white delicate skin with slight transparency, and fine water droplets with wet reflections on the surface. The eyes are long and clear with ice-blue tones and glass-like highlights. The gaze is lowered, quiet, and slightly fragile. Eyelashes are long, makeup is clean, and lips are soft in a low-saturation nude pink.

The hairstyle is a short blue-black gradient hair with dark navy highlights. One side of the hair naturally falls to cover part of the cheek, with a braided structure on top. The strands are wet, light, and delicate with high-precision modeling. She wears exquisite blue crystal geometric earrings and metal ear cuffs.

The outfit is an exquisite oriental fantasy water-themed dress. The upper body wears a white thin, wet-looking satin tight long dress with soft draping and fine highlights. A loose white gauze shirt-like outer layer slips down to the arms, creating layers and a dreamy atmosphere. Black lace details are visible at the waist/hips.

The pose is an elegant side profile, showing a smooth S-curve. The lighting uses a combination of cold white main light and soft backlight, creating a high-key low-saturation cinematic rain-day look. Fine highlights appear on the face, collarbone, and limbs. The overall image is clean, transparent, and high-end.
